blocks.content: Memories of Galliant (2)

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: I'll finish this as quickly as possible. Don't worry. I even took surgery classes once.
Unlike physician, surgeon, which conducts surgical operations, Utilize Schema.
Since physician also have basic Schema, they can cut bones quickly.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: I'm going to start. Hold him down tight as he might have a seizure.
Tess nodded while sobbing.
Amy and Arin watched silently, unable to offer any comforting words.
If they had to choose, they would have run away. But since it was Tess, it was a decision she made with the determination to take responsibility for Rian's life for the rest of his life.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Huu! Huu! Alright, let's begin!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Stop.
The moment the long saw was placed on his shoulder, the physician was startled by the voice and turned around.
Shirone, having regained consciousness, was getting out of bed. The exhausted healing mages lay on the floor, panting.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Tess, what are you doing? Why are you trying to cut off Rian's arm?

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Shirone, Shirone….
Tess burst into tears.
At this point, when she was at a loss as to what decision to make and was just letting the situation dictate her actions, Shirone's recovery felt like a rain in a drought.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone, what should I do? They're going to cut off Rian's arm. Rian will never…

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: But he'll die! Rian will die!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I won't allow it, even if it means his death. I won't allow it.
Shirone's words hit Tess like a dagger to her heart.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Tess, change your mind. Rian wouldn't want this.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: I know! I want Rian to be the greatest swordsman too! But that's important to Rian, not to me! I don't care if he loses an arm!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How can you say something so cruel! Could you say the same in front of Rian?

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: That's why I'm doing this! He's unconscious, so I'll do as I please! Rian is going to throw away his sword now. So you should give up too! Physician, please start quickly!
He's still holding the sword!
Tess's face turned pale as she turned to Rian.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Look at Rian! He's still holding the sword, even now! His hand had only skin and bones left, yet he's still fighting! And you want to cut it off? No one can tell Rian to give up until he does!
Tess looked at Rian's arm.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Why wouldn't he let go of the sword? Did he intend to remain Shirone's sword until his last moment? If so, she could never have him to herself.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: But it didn't matter. That was Rian. Because he was that kind of person…

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: I love him so much.
Tess buried her face in Rian's chest.
She wouldn't treat him. As long as he held the sword until the end, he would be a swordsman even in death.
A faint voice leaked out of Rian's mouth.
Tess's head shot up.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Tes… ss…
Tess's head shot up.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Rian! I'm here! Are you awake? Does it hurt a lot?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Shirone, Shirone is…
He's fine! He made it back safely! We're at Jis's house! You have the worst injuries!
Rian stirred and then raised his upper body.
When he looked at his arm, which was now just bones, his friends' hearts sank.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What is this?
Contrary to expectations, Rian didn't even bat an eyelash.
It was a superhuman feat to be able to remain calm while looking at his mangled arm.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Rian, well, it's just that…
At that moment, the greatsword fell from Rian's arm with a thud.
The bones of his five fingers splayed open, and blood spurted from his shoulder.
Rian! Rian!
The physician pressed down on Rian's shoulder and shouted.

blocks.speaker: Physician
blocks.content: The bleeding has started! Quick, get the coagulant and bandages!
No one moved.
As the physician glared at them with murderous eyes, a strange sound was heard from Rian's arm.
Slosh. Slosh.
It sounded like viscous liquid splashing.
The physician turned his head and stared blankly at Rian's arm, just like everyone else.
The blood flowing down from his shoulder was forming a pattern.
This was impossible. Even the greatest healing magicians couldn't alter the form of blood.

blocks.speaker: Physician
blocks.content: Wha- What exactly are you…
Rian calmly watched his arm recover.
As the nerves recovered, he began to feel like it was his own arm.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What happened? Can someone explain it to me?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Y- You ate the giant's arm. You cut off the giant's arm, and he fed it to you. It turned into a liquid like what's used in the Elixir of Life and went down your throat.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: I cut off an arm? Of a giant?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: It was just a fragmentary image that couldn't be called a memory, but the scene where he cut off Ymir's arm came to mind vaguely.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: 'Still, I got a hit.'
When he put strength into his arms, he felt a strong force.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Is this also a secret related to the Elixir of Life?
At that moment, the room fell silent.
When Rian looked around, everyone had their jaws dropped.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What's wrong? You guys look like someone who's never seen a muscles before.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: A- Are you really okay? It looks like your skin is regenerating too?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Yes, I'm fine.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's not what I'm saying, you idiot! I'm asking how this is even possible!

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: I don't know. It's just happening, so I guess it is.
No matter how bold you are, shouldn't you be suspicious of your own body? Maybe he's not bold at all, but just plain stupid.
All right! You're awake!
The mages tending to Canis shouted.
Canis, who had raised his upper body, looked around with half-closed eyelids and spoke with a frown.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Shut up. I'm exhausted, so don't wake me up.
And then he lay back down in bed and fell into a deep sleep, oblivious to the world.
It was a natural reaction given that he had been tormented by the sleep objet, but considering the situation, his friends were left feeling rather bewildered.
Arin whispered, stroking Canis's head.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: Good night, Canis.
For three days after returning from Heaven, Shirone and his friends received the utmost hospitality from Jis and Yuna.
They averaged 16 hours of sleep a day, and their routine consisted of sleeping, eating, and then sleeping again.
When they gathered for dinner in the living room in the early evening, Shirone would recount their experiences in Heaven.
But he kept quiet about the final war.
Rian frequently broke things with his right arm due to the immense strength he couldn't yet control.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Tess explained that it would take time for him to develop the fine muscles needed to precisely control his newfound power.
Tess cleaned and maintained the drone whenever she had time.
She never let it out of her sight, and even while sleeping, she would stroke it, making eerie noises that frightened Amy and Arin at night.
Canis and Arin spent a lot of time talking alone.
While it seemed that Canis had obtained what he desired from heaven, he didn't share what that was with anyone.
However, he did confess that he was the one who had reduced Kadum's lifespan.
Amy wandered around with the ancient spirit Jack O'Lantern lit up.
When she commented on how cute the bouncing flame was, Rian said Amy was even cuter.
When the boys and girls hung out separately, Amy often stared at Shirone for long periods.
However, true to her meticulous personality, she never let her friends catch her.
Shirone often sat on the sofa, lost in thought.
At such times, the face of Archangel Ikael would come to mind first.
The insight from Ataraxia was still vividly etched in his mind, retaining its warmth.
All those who went to Heaven achieved their desired results, but none received as great a gift as Shirone.
Canis threw a tantrum and demanded to know the secret, but Shirone genuinely didn't know how to explain it.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ikael... Are you doing well?
Due to the nature of its function, the Meta Gate had to be left behind in Heaven.
The coordinates were reset, but with Heaven's technology alone, it might be possible to find a way to bypass Miro's space-time.
But at the last moment, Kariel could not resist Ikael's advice. As long as she took the side of humanity, the final war would not occur.
On one hand, he wanted to meet her again.
Thinking of the grumpy yet soft-hearted Peope made a wave of longing wash over him.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Shirone, let's go to sleep. It would be best to get some rest today.
Amy stood there in her pajamas, looking beautiful in the moonlight.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Right, let's go to sleep.
Shirone entered the room where the boys were sleeping.
In the small attic-like space, Rian's snoring echoed.
Next to him, Canis slept with a pillow pressed over his ears.
Shirone sat in the corner, staring into the darkness.
A shiver ran through him as he thought that everything he had experienced was real.
Starlight filled his eyes as he smiled tensely.
That night.
Jis, who had just returned from work at the port, burst through the front door and came in.
He looked around, panting, and then ran first to the room where the men were sleeping.

blocks.speaker: Jis
blocks.content: We're in big trouble! Wake up! Hurry!
As he opened the door and shouted, Canis' pillow flew out and hit him in the face.
No one woke up.
After a trip to Heaven, nothing seemed like a big deal anymore.

blocks.speaker: Jis
blocks.content: I told you to wake up quickly! Don't blame me later!
Shirone woke up, rubbing his eyes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What's going on? What's the matter?

blocks.speaker: Jis
blocks.content: Wake the others and come downstairs! We have to leave now!
Jis turned around and went down to the first floor without any time to explain.
And this time, he barged into the room where the girls were sleeping.

blocks.speaker: Jis
blocks.content: Girls! Wake up! Yuna, you too, hurry!
Ugh, what is it…?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Hey! How dare you barge into a girls' room while we're sleeping! Do you want to die?

blocks.speaker: Jis
blocks.content: Ouch! Sorry! It's urgent!
Jis realized his mistake only after noticing the girls in their pajamas.
Tess, who was sleeping with her belly button exposed, looked like an adult.
But there was really no time to waste, so he grabbed Amy's hand and pulled her up.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Alright, alright. Girls, wake up. Jis seems to have something important to say.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Ugh, I'm so tired. What is it?
Meanwhile, the boys, rubbing their sleepy eyes, descended the stairs.
Shirone, feeling annoyed at losing sleep for what seemed like no reason, peeked into the girls' room.
Arin and Tess were making up the bed, and Amy was being dragged out by Jis with sleepy eyes.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: If this turns out to be nothing, I'm going to be really mad. I'll make you pay double for barging into our room.

blocks.speaker: Jis
blocks.content: Sure! Once you hear me out, you'll understand!
After many twists and turns, everyone gathered in the living room.
Jis opened his mouth after wondering how he should tell his friends so they wouldn't die of heart attacks.

blocks.speaker: Jis
blocks.content: Do you know what today is?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I don't know. Is today your birthday?

blocks.speaker: Jis
blocks.content: No! It's the day that comes once every ten years…!
At that moment, Yuna, who woke up late, ran out of the girls' room in a hurry and shouted.

blocks.speaker: Yuna
blocks.content: Brother! Kaios! Kaios!
Shirone tilted his head and asked.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What is Kaios?

blocks.speaker: Jis
blocks.content: Sea Dragon! Sea Dragon Kaios is coming here!
Sir, please go faster!
The carriage carrying Shirone and his friends raced toward the port.
Amy bit her lip nervously.
There hadn't been time to change, so she was still in her pajamas.
